steps.title: Turn each percent change into a multiplier
steps.content: $a$ is $70\%$ less than $b$, so $30\%$ of $b$ remains: $$a=0.30b$$ Also, $c$ is $60\%$ greater than $a$, so $$c=1.60a$$

steps.title: Confirm the grid-in answer
steps.content: Since $c=0.48b$, the number $c$ is $0.48$ times $b$. Enter .48 or 0.48.
